New Energy Case

Test Fixture for a New Energy Storage Module

module testing / positioning / repeated loading

IndustriesNew Energy
Part Functionmodule testing / positioning / repeated loading
Manufacturing Capabilitiesfixture machining, insulating material parts, aluminum structural parts and dimensional inspection

Project Scenario

The project supported repeated storage module test loading where positioning consistency and insulation details were checked together.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The fixture helped stabilize the test process and confirm the fit between module, locating features and operating clearance.
